source_jobs.description: <p>We're always looking for amazing educators and professionals to join our organization. If you don't see an open role that aligns to your background, interests, and experience, feel free to leave your resume here. We'll contact you once a role opens that we believe fits your expertise. Reach out to <a href="mailto:jobs@ehtp.org">jobs@ehtp.org</a> with any questions.</p>
